title: taraxacum sparsum
intro: Taraxacum sparsum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its smaller size and fewer leaves compared to the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum sparsum include its ability to stimulate digestion and act as a diuretic, which can help relieve symptoms of indigestion and urinary issues. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum sparsum include its potential to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum sparsum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
